info.name: OpenMRS API Testing — Chandra Siddartha
info.description:
Complete REST API test suite for OpenMRS.
Target Company: Optum
Author: Chandra Siddartha
Base URL: http://localhost:8080/openmrs/ws/rest/v1
Auth: Basic Auth (admin / Admin123)

item.name: 01 — Authentication
item.description: Verify Basic Auth works correctly with valid and invalid credentials.

request.description: Verify API is accessible with valid Basic Auth credentials.
Verify API returns 401 with wrong password.

exec: // OpenMRS returns 200 even for bad creds, but authenticated=false
pm.test("API_002 | No user object in response", function() {

item.name: 03 — Person API
item.description: Person resource — underlying data for Patient.

request.description: Retrieve list of persons.
Create a new person record.
Get person details by UUID.

item.name: 04 — Visit API
item.description: Visit resource — represents a patient visit/appointment.

request.description: Retrieve list of visits.
Create a visit for the test patient.
Retrieve full visit details.
End a visit by setting stopDatetime.

item.name: API_019 — GET Visits for a Patient

request.description: Get all visits for a specific patient.

item.description: Encounter resource — clinical interactions during a visit.

request.description: Retrieve list of encounters.
Create an encounter linked to patient and visit.
Retrieve full encounter details.
Retrieve list of system users.

item.description: Boundary conditions, invalid inputs, and security edge cases.

Verify 400 for empty request body on POST.

item.name: API_033 — GET with SQL Injection in Query Param

request.description: Verify API handles SQL injection safely — no 500 error, no data leak.

exec: pm.test("API_033 | No 500 Server Error on SQL injection attempt", function() {

request.description: Verify XSS payload in query param does not cause server error.
